# INKTENEBRIS

Official website of artist Soumalya Sarkar.

Artist Name:
INKTENEBRIS

Medium:
Ballpoint Pen

Primary Topics:
- Dark Art
- Dark Surrealism
- Psychological Horror
- Ballpoint Pen Drawings
- Surreal Illustration

Official Website:
https://inktenebris.github.io

Content:
Original artworks, artist statement,
curriculum vitae, exhibition history,
press materials and portfolio content.

Copyright:
All artworks © Soumalya Sarkar.
All Rights Reserved.
